title: Advanced Scientific Calculator with GUI
description: A fully-featured scientific calculator built with Python and Tkinter. Supports basic arithmetic, trigonometric functions (sin, cos, tan), logarithms (log₁₀, ln, log₂), exponents (xʸ, eˣ, 10ˣ), roots (√x, ∛x), factorial, reciprocal, percentage, memory operations (M+, M-, MR, MC), constants (π, e), answer recall (ANS), and a persistent history panel. The UI is keyboard-friendly and all operations are implemented without eval() for maximum security and input validation.
techStack: Python 3, Tkinter, Math Library, Object-Oriented Design

title: Advanced Student Management System GUI
description: A comprehensive Java-based desktop application featuring a Swing-designed GUI for academic administration. Implements secure data handing, object-oriented desing patterns, and robust input validation to prevent data corruption.

title: Vehicle Information System (Java OOP)
description: A modular vehicle management system for a car rental agency. Implements OOP principles (interfaces, inheritance, encapsulation) with type‑safe enums and robust input validation. Users can enter and display details for cars, motorcycles, and trucks. Features professional error handling, range checks, and reusable input utilities.
techStack: Java 17+, OOP, Enums, Scanner, Try‑with‑Resources, Custom Validation

title: Brand Identity & Visual Graphics
description: A curated collection of my graphic design projects, including logo design, print materials, social media visuals, and UI concepts. Each piece focuses on clean composition, typography, and brand storytelling.
